normalization.notes: Store learner-visible forms in NFC so common accented Latin characters remain precomposed when available. Analysis tooling may decompose to inspect combining marks.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: base Latin letters, accented grapheme clusters, common combining marks, and selected special letters
segmentation.notes: European Latin-script text is whitespace-delimited. Teach marks such as acute, grave, circumflex, umlaut, cedilla, and tilde as reusable visual features across languages.
